positions.detail: MANDATORY CLOSE by 2:00 PM ET. Current P&L: -100%. Use market order if needed — do not let expire unmanaged.

agent_analysis:
## CRITICAL — Friday Expiry Day

### Position Status

| Ticker | Dir | Stock Move | Option P&L | Status | Action |
|--------|-----|-----------|------------|--------|--------|
| AAPL | CALL | -7.3% | **-100%** | STOP_HIT | **CLOSE NOW** |

---

### Assessment

**AAPL CALL:** Total loss. Stock moved -7.3% against a call — that's catastrophic for a weekly option. At -100%, this position is either worthless or pennies. The -50% hard stop should have triggered earlier in the week; if it didn't fire automatically, this is a process failure to flag in reflection. Delta is effectively zero. There is nothing to recover.

No other positions reported — either this was a single-pick week or the other two were already closed.

---

### RECOMMENDATION

**Close AAPL immediately at market. Do not wait for 2 PM. Accept the full loss.**

If any residual bid exists (even $0.01), hit it now — liquidity evaporates on expiry Friday afternoons. Every minute you hold a worthless 0DTE option is pure execution risk with zero upside.

**Post-close action:** Flag for weekly reflection — a -7.3% stock move against thesis in a single week suggests either (1) an undetected event risk (earnings, downgrade, macro shock), or (2) directional signal failure. With the 8-week log showing **0/10 on calls** and 33% overall win rate, the call bias needs serious scrutiny in Sunday's reflection. The system is bleeding on calls consistently.
